title: polygala rosea
intro: Polygala rosea, also known as pink milkwort or common polygala, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala rosea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules and syrups, to harness its medicinal properties.
